programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Gossip flies about Caroline and a man (Gil Gerard) building her kitchen in exchange for room and board.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A pack of wild dogs, crazed with hunger, kills the livestock of Walnut Grove farmers. With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle, Melissa Sue Anderson and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: After an unknown thief plagues Walnut Grove, Laura (Melissa Gilbert) and her friend investigate. With Michael Landon and Karen Grassle.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Doc Baker (Kevin Hagen) decides to retire after a patient dies. With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle, Melissa Sue Anderson and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary (Melissa Sue Anderson) is held hostage by the outlaw Jesse James (guest star Dennis Rucker). With Michael Landon, Karen Grassle and Melissa Gilbert.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Jonathan Garvey's barn burns down leaving the family with no means of support, but Jonathan is angry when his wife takes a job at the post office.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles take Jonathan's place in a bout with an aging fighter (Moses Gunn), but victory dims when Charles realizes the boxer is badly injured.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary plans to meet a shy suitor at the Mankato Fair, until she encounters his charming balloonist boss.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Adam and Luke Simms move to Walnut Grove; Luke falls in love with Nellie but she has reservations about him.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: An American Indian boy arrives in town seeking medical help for his ailing father. With Michael Landon and Karen Grassle.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura wants to impress a newly discovered old buddy; Charles and Jonathan try to start a freight line, which leads them further away from home.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary takes a teaching job in a backwoods community only to clash with a hostile woman bent on driving her away.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Caroline recalls her first meeting with Charles when he is late for their wedding anniversary celebration.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura finds a bottle bearing a message floating downstream, then another containing an infant's picture.

programme.title: Willa's Wild Life
programme.desc: Dooley has a new hobby, magic! / Willa and the animals find an egg in the backyard.

programme.title: Willa's Wild Life
programme.desc: Tiny accidentally launches a tetherball into the mysterious next door neighbors yard. / Willa and the animals hear a noise in the attic.

programme.title: Nefertine on the Nile
programme.desc: Tuja is on cloud nine because today she is going on a short felucca trip with her friends Nefertine and Piramses. / Nefertine wants to participate in an ostrich race, but Piramses is not at all convinced that it is a good idea…

programme.title: Nefertine on the Nile
programme.desc: Bullaton is excited because that evening, his father will receive an award for his courage in protecting the Pharaoh. / In the gardens of the royal palace a heartbreaking meow can be heard.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Sally is trying to make a vase for her mother, but each one she tries falls over. Cat takes them to Blueprintia, and they discover what they can learn by designing before building.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Sally is playing a song on an instrument made up of different things in the Treehouse, but she can't find the right note for her song.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Sally keeps getting found when they play Hide and Seek. Cat takes them to Tagaloo to meet a great seeker.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: When Nick's magic trick causes his toy car to disappear under the porch, the Cat takes them to Arcade Island to win a Gasper-ma-clasper.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Squirt, Shimmer, and Spinner come across Felix a tongue-tied frog. They help Felix get free and become instant playmates.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: The kids disguise Felix as a big green bug in an effort to have him join them at the "Be Good to Bugs Day" fair. Felix becomes an honorary bug when he saves his friends from a raging storm and spends the night in the Cozy Hole.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Felix spends a night at the Cozy Hole with the Spider family, he decides he'd rather be a bug and not to go home. In order to bring the froggy family together, Miss Spider goes to the Taddy Puddle for a parent to parent talk.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Willow brings home a mushroom, and a full invasion follows. / A windstorm injures Berry, the lifeguard at Taddy Puddle.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett flies to Battambang, Cambodia, to deliver a duck whistle to a girl named Solyna so she can help her parents herd their ducks into a truck; when the ducks escape, Sky scrambles Paul's Police Patrol to help track down the waddling wildlife.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Louisa in Germany goes to visit her favorite amusement park, she's sad to learn that it is being closed forever; the Super Wings work to give the park a makeover and a whole new lease on life.

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: The filmmakers shed light on Argentina's dangerous Atlantic coastline, where orcas hunt young sea lions and penguins use clever tricks to protect their offspring.

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve tries to figure out if crocodiles are better off living in the wild or within the confines of the reserve; looking the world's oldest croc in the eye and how a crayfish reshapes an entire ecosystem.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Welcome to India - a land of exotic animals and exotic warfare; monkeys stage dusty dust-ups, blackbucks wage open war on the open plains, and peacock dandies swing switchblades: these are colorful battles worthy of a vibrant land.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Massive elephant seals go nose to nose to win the title of beach master; giant petrels earn the nickname "murderous garbagemen"; a female humpback goes to extremes to protect her calf from amorous males.

programme.title: Coastal Africa
programme.desc: The struggle of the African Penguin, which lives in a hostile environment.

programme.title: Kenya Wildlife Diaries
programme.desc: Lewa Conservacy is working to protect the Grévy's zebras population.

programme.title: Siberia's Wild Year
programme.desc: Only the hardiest animals are capable of carving out a life in Siberia. From the ice-covered shores of the north, across miles of barren tundra, to the depths of the taiga forest, animals must face incredible challenges and fight for survival.

programme.title: Shetland's Otters
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the shy, sweet otters that live in these remote islands.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: In India, Ravi the baby lion-tailed macaque faces life in a shrinking habitat and encroaching human world; Ravi has a caring mom, a protective dad, a playful sister and numerous, cousins, aunts and uncles all watching over him.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Koala
programme.desc: Koala behavior changes dramatically during mating season.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Tracking down Lahei, who's gone AWOL; seeing who earns their post-college freedom.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Bidding farewell to old friends and celebrating Molly and Bumi's big move.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: The small stature of Borneo's dwarf elephants is due to a biological phenomenon; due to their endangered habitat, they have shrunk over generations.

programme.title: The Magic Circle of the Reef
programme.desc: Pelagic beings live in the so-called reef water column, the zone between the seabed and the surface. They are species that travel the sea placidly, feeding when they are hungry and swimming slowly throughout their lives.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las advertencias de Valentino se convierten en amenazas. A Alex le regalan un shot, pero en la cara. Llega un nuevo Ex y los celos llenan a la villa de problemas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Valentino celebra el peor cumpleaños por culpa de la Sala Tornado. Desenmascaran a Queen quien saca su furia. Un Ex cae en una venganza tramada. Dos estrenan la Love Suite. Diana y Fershy arruinan la fiesta peleando y alguien debe partir de la villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Fershy decide quien se va, entre Beni y Alba. La Sala Tornado cocina una venganza que los hará tambalear a todos. Lilian explora con Alba y Bryan mientras que Asaf aprovecha con Valeria. En la nueva habitacion hay sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: El nuevo Ex sorprende entrando por la puerta trasera. Asaf arrastra su corazon por culpa de la indiferencia de Lilian, quien prueba los labios de Bryan y Alba. Ana va a la Love Suite y Aldo aprovecha para destrozar las camas. Un Ex llega acompañado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Bebeshita busca a Queen para hablar, pero tambien para desgreñarla. En un barco pirata, Queen le promete amor a Fano mientras que en la Villa le espera un fantasma del pasado. Dos EX deben regresar al mar por culpa de la Sala Tornado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las peleas en la Villa no cesan. Asaf prueba más labios y el corazon de Lilian se parte. Más Ex se van mientras que la ultima en llegar, espera en la Love Suite. La Sala Tornado llama a Brandon y repite la historia, pero ahora con Queen.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Venganza de los EX reune a 10 solteros y solteras que se van de vacaciones al paraiso, pero todo se distorsiona cuando suena la tablet del terror y les anuncia la llegada de sus EX.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: 10 influencers llegan a sus vacaciones en el caribe, pero la "Tablet del Karma" les recuerda que deben saldar cuentas con sus Ex. Asaf elige a Lilian para su corazon.

programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Elizabeth Ashley guest stars as a beautiful IMF agent who becomes the key to determining if enemy agent Nicholai Varsi is telling the truth when he claims he's defecting to the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: George Maharis guest stars as John Bachman, an underworld figure with access to the syndicate's top secret computerized records who is convinced by the IMF that he has found the fountain of youth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time. His team includes a master of disguise, a femme fatale, an electronics whiz, an incredibly strong man, and a safecracker.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with paramedics who show him an ambulance and some of the equipment they use.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Marilyn Barnett go to see her students play basketball in wheelchairs. Lady Elaine Fairchilde and cousin Mary Owl find a piece of paper that mentions a secret tunnel.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a piece of plastic pipe and talks about tunnels. Mr. McFeely shows up with a video of him driving his car through a car wash. Cousin Mary Owl believes a tunnel may exist under Henrietta Pussycat's and X the Owl's tree.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Chuck Aber demonstrates a small backhoe. Lady Aberlin has a fan, a flashlight and a measuring tape for the owls to use when they go into the tunnel. Mr. McFeely shares a video about how people make tortilla chips.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows his control box that makes Trolley go fast and slow. Trolley shows King Friday and Mayor Maggie how it can go very fast and very slow. Neighbor Aber and Mayor Maggie discuss how to get Trolley to slow down.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reflects on a day when he went roller skating with his friend Stephen Lee. Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about how people make roller skates. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, the Trolley is still moving very quickly.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers has a gift for Mr. McFeely -- the Speedy Delivery Alphabet Book. Lady Aberlin and Prince Tuesday try to cheer up Daniel Tiger who is sad because he cannot say the alphabet as quickly as Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Chainey Umphrey and sees a gymnastics demonstration. Lady Aberlin and Neighbor Aber have built a feathered contraption over the Trolley tracks to help them catch the speeding Trolley. Lady Elaine falls on the feathers.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a toy crane. When he lifts objects slowly, the crane works perfectly. Neighbor Aber and Corney use a crane to catch the Trolley. Trolley's controls are adjusted back to normal.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart invites Mister Rogers to her home where she and Chef Brockett are making bread pudding for a family reunion. Prince Tuesday tells Chef Brockett he doesn't like what he sees in the mirror. Chef Brockett tells the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a photo book of twins and explains that even though identical twins look alike, each one is unique.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Noticing that each string on Mr. Negri's guitar is different, Mister Rogers makes mention that every person is different. The King asks Lady Aberlin for her help in tending to Prince Tuesday's recent change in mood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Who does the puppet voices in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe? Mister Rogers shows how he works some of the puppets and visits with the voice of Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a kazoo and plays it. He shows a film of how people make kazoos. Neighbor Aber and Lady Aberlin use kazoos to try and call for Corney for his birthday party. He responds and arrives at the castle.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Renowned artist, Red Grooms, gives Mister Rogers a tour of his studio and the life-size bus "sculpture" he is working on. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine is angry that her Eiffel Tower drawing isn't turning out well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains that there are different ways to deal with mad feelings as some might use art and others may use music. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine is still angry about her Eiffel Tower drawing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There are lots of things people can do with their hands. Even when they are angry, they can do things with their hands that won't hurt others.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Mientras pasean por la Feria Estatal, Perro y Gato se encuentran montando sobre un feroz toro. / El odontólogo Rancio el Conejo descubre que cualquier cosa que Perro coma, afecta a los dientes de Gato y viceversa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: A pesar de las objeciones de Gato, Perro arrastra a Gato al Parque Temático para subirse a Butt Buster, una montaña rusa que va a 200 millas por hora. / El Alcalde Rancio necesita más fondos para su tina de monedas de oro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato en bancarrota, bailan en la calle, pintan retratos de las personas y venden una manzana podrida a Cliff, el perro Grasoso. / Aparece un gorila en la casa de Perro y Gato justo cuando estaban saliendo al bowling.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están descansando en el jardín cuando se encuentran con Lola Caricola, que se muda al árbol que tienen en el jardín. / Perro y Gato trabajan como empresa de catering en una lujosa fiesta en una mansión de Nearburg.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El automóvil de Perro y Gato se rompe y se ven obligados de llevarlo al taller de Lube. / Perro encuentra la vieja cámara de Gato y pasea por todo Nearburg tomando fotografías de personas en situaciones vergonzosas.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se tropiezan con un plató de cine, y se convierten en dobles. / Perro y Gato convencen a Lola de infiltrarse entre los Grasosos para conocer sus hábitos y encontrar sus debilidades.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito se tropieza con los perros Groseros en la calle cantando Doo Wop. Los reúne con Perro y Gato y forman un grupo de canto para convertirse en súper estrellas. / Lola Caricola tiene que hacer un documental sobre Gato y Perro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Nearburg se convierte en tierra invernal y Perro y Gato, Lola, Dunglap, Mervis y los perros Grasosos aprovechan la oportunidad para pasear en trineo por la nieve. / Perro obtiene un equipo de hipnosis de juguete.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro construye su propio Camión de Monstruos y arrastra a Gato hasta la plaza de Nearburg para participar del Rally de camiones de monstruos. / Lola convence a Perro y Gato de producir miel en el jardín.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato pelean durante el almuerzo y continúan en la cocina, tiran harina, azúcar, chocolate y frutas por todo el lugar. / Perro y Gato heredan algunas tierras en la costa del hermoso lago Wanamaker, empacan sus cosas y se van.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se transportan al año 3001 para luchar contra el malvado Gran Tito. / Lola vence a Gato por primera vez en la Convención de Inventos de Nearburg y lo que convierte a Gato en un enemigo envidioso.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Walt, el pavo del desfile de Acción de Gracias, aparece en la casa de Perro y Gato buscando refugio. Perro lo hace entrar y el hambriento Gato lo quiere devorar.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es la noche de Halloween y Gato, se disfraza como Duque Kahanamoku de Hawai y Perro, se disfraza como Conde Perrdrácula, salen en busca de dulces. Un vampiro peruano, Nosferacho, muerde a Perro y lo convierte en vampiro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro está entusiasmado porque hoy es el Día de Bromas Raras, la versión del Día de los Inocentes. / Perro y Gato se preparan para volver al reencuentro de la vieja escuela, en donde Gato quiere reavivar su romance con Sally.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el Día Anual de los Padres y, como siempre, Gato y Perro quedan excluidos porque no tienen padres. Perro espera que este año sus padres finalmente aparezcan. Gato insiste en que la búsqueda es en vano.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La nave espacial en la que estaban Perro y Gato cae en un lago congelado donde un monstro del lago termina comiéndoselos como a un bocadillo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Una vez en el pueblo de Perros y Gatos, CatDog logran que todos los perros y gatos de la ciudad se enfrenten los unos a otros. Comienza una batalla en la cual Perro y Gato intentan interferir pero nada sale como lo esperaban.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Hace un año desde que el álter ego del súper héroe Perro el Poderoso salvó al Alcalde Rancio el Conejo de la Parca y ahora Nearburg está celebrando. / Los sobrinos de Tito vienen de visita.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están en la Convención de Fanáticos de Mean Bob, mirando una lucha de WWF entre Mean Bob y su enemigo Evil Eric. / Tito sale a caminar, y Gato y Perro aprovechan para entrar a su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Este es el cuento de un viejo pescador sobre el pez espada que cuelga de la pared del living de Perro y Gato. / Gato sufre una crisis de identidad cuando una banda de gatos bohemios abre una tienda cerca de la casa de Perro y Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Desde que era un cachorro, Perro siempre persiguió al camión de la basura, conocido como el viejo 159. / Perro tiene que ponerse un cono sobre su cabeza para protegerse de las picaduras de garrapatas en la oreja.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Maggie investigates reasons why Maura Murray secretly drove to New Hampshire and never came home, including a possible pregnancy or an emotional phone call with her sister.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: There are questions about happened to Maura after she crashed on a rural road in New Hampshire: did she run into the woods, hop into a car with someone she knew and escape to a new life in Canada, or worse, hitch a ride with a dangerous stranger.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: New Hampshire's law enforcement community keeps their findings of Maura's case close to the chest; Maggie explores the theories related to a police conspiracy, hoping to break down a decade-long code of silence.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Killers and kidnappers are Maggie's focus as she works to find out if Maura Murray was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: Natalee Holloway disappears from Aruba in May 2005, and her father Dave never stops looking for her; he receives a new lead that could be the key to solving the 12-year-old mystery, but he has suspicions about the source.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ and his team head to Aruba to begin phase two of their investigation - attempting to obtain DNA evidence from Natalee's alleged burial site; Dave must convince his informant to go the extra mile.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ races to the location where the co-conspirator claims he dug up Natalee's remains in 2010; working with the Aruban authorities, they search for DNA that could lead to convicting those involved in Natalee's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys make a return visit to fan favorite Hobo Jack's sprawling forest sanctuary in Illinois. But wading through his "junkalanche" proves easier than making a deal.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are dreaming of a California mega score when they stumble upon a salvage yard that's been in a family for generations. The place looks promising...but the owner has never let anyone inside. Can Frank and Mike talk their way in?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Thanks to his vast collection of stuffed animals and weird curios, lifelong picker and yard sale aficionado Lester is known by his neighbors as the "spooky collector." Tension builds between Mike and Frank over the value of the animals.

programme.desc: The Pawn Stars fire off to the shooting range to check out an antique signal cannon from the 1980's TV series Magnum P.I. Will the guys bring out the big guns.

programme.desc: The guys bid on a timepiece once owned by Elvis and Joker returns to the shop with a furry friend to hunt down a deal.

programme.desc: The guys head out to the old west where a customer brings in a rare Lone Ranger collection.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Kandahar
programme.desc: After his mission is exposed, a CIA operative (Gerard Butler) and his Afghan translator must fight their way out of hostile territory to an extraction point in Kandahar.

programme.desc: Natasha Henstridge (Species) stars in this action-packed thriller that will shock you at every turn. When DEA agents are ambushed by sicarios in a fatal shootout, the survivors must play a deadly game of cat and mouse to live through the night.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: A strange nurse haunts Keiichiro, which triggers memories of the past. Not just for Satsuki and Keiichiro, who remember the death of their mother, but for Momoko as well, who happened to meet their mother just before she passed away.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: A ghostly painter with the ability to trap souls within his work has reawakened, and not even the other ghosts of the old schoolhouse want anything to do with him.

programme.title: Ghost Stories

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: Satsuki falls in with a bad crowd, or it might be better to say coven. Several girls at her school conspire to cast spells together, and she reluctantly joins in.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: Following an accident on the job, Satsuki's father is injured, but Leo thinks ghosts are behind it.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: The gang takes a trip to the mountains to stay at a resort run by Satsuki's cousin Miyuki. However, upon arrival, a young girl tells them that Miyuki is dead. It seems that her ghost still haunts the frozen lake, turning it blood red.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: Satsuki is asked to perform the after school broadcast in the wake of the previous announcers having fallen ill under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Ghost Stories

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: The entire school is possessed and drawn into the old schoolhouse, all to lure Satsuki and the gang into a trap. Lord Ohma has awoken, and seeks vengeance upon Satsuki for her family's past attempts to seal him.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Beast
programme.desc: Jun Fudo is taken by a mysterious woman and finds herself being attacked by a werewolf-like creature. As she tries to save herself, she transforms into Devil Lady.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Blood
programme.desc: Jun tries to regain some sense of normalcy as she resumes her modeling career but finds herself yet again struggling to come to terms with her true identity.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Wings
programme.desc: A mysterious boy appears in front of Jun one night, proclaiming that he'll kill Jun's lover then disappears in to the darkness. Fearing that Kazumi is in danger, Jun hurries to Kazumi's home.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Embryo
programme.desc: As Jun breaksdown and confess her struggles of being the Devil Lady, Lan Asuka appears once again to take Jun to a military compound.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Shark
programme.desc: Lan informs Jun that Aoi Kurosaki, Jun's old classmate, is possessor of Devil Beast Syndrome and may potentially be Jun's new ally.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Cat
programme.desc: Due to their similiar looks, Hitomi often loses out on her modeling opportunities to Jun. Despite this, Hitomi finds herself attracted to Jun, arising the suspicion that Hitomi may also be another Beast.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Fog
programme.desc: Experiencing her defeat at the hands of Airial, Jun ends up at a local hospital while a deep fog encircles the city. Dismayed by Jun's defeat, Lan commands her to battle the beast once more.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Enemy
programme.desc: Jun is introduced to Dr. Jason Bates who professes his interest in her, both as a woman and as Devil Lady.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Eyes
programme.desc: Jun can't shake off the feeling that she's being watched. All the while, Lan and HA team discover that curious string of murders have been occuring where the victims' eyes have been taken.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Flames
programme.desc: Four year old Remi is miraculously rescued from a fire. Suspecting her to be another Beast, Lan orders for the girl to be further evaluated.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Box
programme.desc: When four bodies are found inside an elevator of a department store in midst of a Christmas season, Jun is ordered by Lan to investigate the matter on a Christmas eve.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Faces
programme.desc: Jun wakes from a nightmare in which a Beast hunts one another. Puzzled by the cryptic dream Jun is haunted by the nightmare even while she's awake.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Rope
programme.desc: A highschool girl is lured to a famous illustrator, Otoya's residence. She is hosted by his sister-in-law who captures the teen and offers her to Otoya who had turned in to a Beast.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Home
programme.desc: Suspecting that Jun is connected to the murder of his wife and their only daughter, Sakazawa contacts her by claiming that he has kidnapped Kazumi.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Crows
programme.desc: As Kazumi debates on whether to pursue her career in modeling or to attend college, a series of murders occur in which victims are impaled in high places.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Voice
programme.desc: Mysterious series of murders show no signs of stopping. The guilt of putting Kazumi's life in danger further weighs down Jun, leading the two to revisit Kazumi's former home where her parents were murdered.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Hunger
programme.desc: Fearing that she is slowly losing control of herself, Jun soon decides that she can no longer continue her career as a fashion model.

programme.title: Go Nagai's The Devil Lady: Body
programme.desc: Jun is now kept in a HA facility. As they conduct various examinations she wonders off to a sector of the lab where she finds Dr. Bates who has been captured by Lan.

programme.desc: It has been six months, Jun exiled herself away from the city and had been living quietly with an elderly couple and their granddaughter.

programme.title: About Adam
programme.desc: When carefree Lucy (Kate Hudson) finally meets her perfect man, Adam (Stuart Townsend), she's ready to give up her wild ways and settle down for good. But while Lucy is busy making plans for her wedding, Adam is busy charming the rest of her family!

programme.title: Life Partners
programme.desc: At 29, the most long-term relationship Sasha (Leighton Meester) and Paige (Gillian Jacobs) have ever been in is with each other, using their co-dependent friendship as an excuse not to venture out into the dating world alone.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan (John Cusack) and Sara (Kate Bekinsale) meet unexpectedly, but part ways, determining that fate will guide their future if they're meant to be together.

programme.title: A Guy Thing

programme.title: About Adam

programme.title: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: Ben Affleck, Jennifer Lopez, and George Carlin headline this irresistible comedy from director Kevin Smith (CLERKS). It's a heartfelt tale of a suddenly-single father who must accept his identity, and acknowledge what makes him happy.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Vanessa has a final showdown with the Second Elder in San Francisco. In Denver, Flesh, Doc, Julius and Jolene learn that even in a Safe-Zone, life isn't easy.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Sam moves closer to his destiny while Mohamad tries to free himself from imprisonment. Axel escorts San Francisco survivors to Denver. Ivory and Scab take control of the Daywalker horde.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: On a distant island, Vanessa and Scarlett battle the Third Elder which leads Vanessa to make a choice about her path forward, one that Scarlett does not agree with.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Doc and Jolene clash with Denver authorities over the repellent. Flesh chooses to face his past. Axel struggles with leaving Scarlett behind. Ivory and the Sisterhood infiltrate Denver.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Vanessa, trapped in an abandoned slaughterhouse, wrestles between the light and dark sides of her own self before she can move forward on her path to find the Final Elder.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: In his hometown, Axel fights both his tragic past and a vicious pack of Daywalkers. Sam can’t find Mohamad, and takes his anger out on Chad and Mike.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Scarlett is reunited with Axel but he is badly injured before they can find Vanessa. A mysterious man helps them find their way. Flesh and Jolene are fugitives on the run from Blaktek.

programme.title: Van Helsing

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: With the amulet in hand, Vanessa and Lily Van Helsing escape from Elder Sam and return to the real world. As Denver falls to the Daywalkers, Hansen escorts Julius and Doc to Fort Collins.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: After Violet is attacked by Daywalkers, Julius and Doc discover information that Hansen will do anything to keep quiet. Vanessa's new path draws her to help a group of survivors led by Jack.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: On the road, a grieving and aimless Axel rescues an enigmatic Max who returns the favor with a job offer. Flesh and Jolene finally make it to Loveland and attempt to redeem Flesh's past.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: After an epic battle, Axel reconciles with Vanessa and comes to terms with the death of Scarlett. At the Sisterhood, Elder Sam, Ivory and the Oracle come together to raise the Third Bride.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Sam and the Brides arrive at Fort Collins where Hansen reveals a long-held secret for raising the Dark One. Axel returns to Loveland where Flesh and Jolene take one last stand against Max.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: In a desert infested with strange new vampires, Flesh and Axel chase a crazed Max who has Jennifer and Owen held hostage. When night falls, their chances of survival turn for the worse.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: When it comes to the birth of the universe, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the Big Bang.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one of Earth's closest neighbors, but until very recent exploratory missions, it eluded astronomers' best efforts to learn its secrets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: why have alien civilizations not presented themselves?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: An advanced $900 million planetary explorer designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal intricate details undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: The night sky has always been a source of wonder and mystery. In the quest to explore the universe, our greatest ally is the Hubble telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Painted By Light
programme.desc: When the universe formed, all of space blazed white-hot, but it didn't last. Darkness reined for 200 million years before the light was reborn.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Colour
programme.desc: Color is essential to both art and astronomy. When measured, it can tell us the temperature, chemical composition, and motion of astronomical objects.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Perspective
programme.desc: For most of human history, the night sky seemed two-dimensional. To our ancestors, this perspective gave no hint to the universe's true depth.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Without water, civilization is simply not possible; Romans took control of their water seriously.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: Stadiums have been regarded as architectural masterpieces, none more so than the Colosseum in Rome.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: Animal rights activists free a group of infected chimps to horrifying results. 28 days later, Jim wakes from a coma and explores a deserted London. He soon learns the truth behind the deserted streets and the menacing creatures that lurk in the shadows.

programme.title: 57 Seconds
programme.desc: Josh Hutcherson and Morgan Freeman star in this heart-racing action thriller. Every second counts for a tech blogger who wields a time-altering device to seek revenge on a ruthless corporate empire and ignites a pulse-pounding battle for survival.

programme.title: Hotel Rwanda
programme.desc: The film chronicles the true story of Paul Rusesabinga (Don Cheadle), a brave hotel manager who risked his life and those of his family to take in more than 1,000 refugees during the 1994 genocide of the Tutsus by Hutu militia.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: When the brilliant but unorthodox scientist Dr. Victor Frankenstein rejects the artificial man that he has created, the Creature escapes and later swears revenge.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: Halloween With The New Addams Family
programme.desc: America's first family of ghastly giddiness reunites for a Halloween celebration that will raise the…dead! John Astin, Carolyn Jones, Ted Cassidy, Jackie Coogan, Lisa Loring and Ken Weatherwax all reprise their roles from the hit original series!

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: After a severe round of testing, the two remaining smiths have only four days in their home forges to recreate one of Japan's deadliest swords: the Nagamaki.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths aim for the stars when they are tasked with forging fantasy blades from a meteorite. Forced to use the canister method, the smiths battle difficult forge welds in order to create their one of a kind blades.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths fight fire with fire when they must dismantle a forge and use that steel to construct a blade. The competition gets heated as the smiths struggle to salvage enough material to create a san mai billet.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths face triple the challenges when they must forge a canister Damascus blade from three different steels using three separate cans.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are dispatched to the snowy winter tundra to forge a kukri with steel harvested from an old snowmobile. Provided with no power tools, the smiths might fight to forge their blades with just hand tools and the dreaded coal forge.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: It's anyone's game when four bladesmiths are tasked with forging blades from old toys using the san mai technique. The smiths realize playtime is over as the pressure of the competition heats up and they experience difficult delaminations.

programme.title: Swamp People

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: the Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring's dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus's hired duelist Panik cheats Mai of all her star chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus. Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba's Blue Eyes White Dragon and Joey's Red Eyes Black Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bandit Keith's gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith's zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey's last-ditch effort, his lucky Time Wizard card, fails against Bandit Keith's zombie monsters. But as his lucky streak comes to an end, will his improving skills as a duelist and his love for his sister inspire him to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers with all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus's castle on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or is his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, the Summoned Skull, and the Red-Eyes Black Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of the Gate Guardian.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi's heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his star chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Tea bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra star chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends enter the castle to discover Kaiba ready to duel Pegasus with Mokuba's soul hanging in the balance! The power of the Millennium Eye gives Pegasus the ability to read other people's minds.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba is helpless against Pegasus's Toon World deck and mind-reading abilities. As the duel ends, Pegasus imprisons Kaiba's soul into a card, just like Grandpa and Mokuba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus's secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Under Pegasus's glare, Yugi is distracted from his duel with Mai. After making foolish errors and allowing Mai to gain a huge advantage with her Harpie's Pet Dragon, will Yugi gather his focus or succumb to the pressure?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has rebounded from her previous loss to Joey to become a better duelist. Has Yugi learned from his loss to Kaiba, or is the emotional defeat still weighing on his heart? The answer is in the cards!

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Nora targets Dice as a way to get revenge on Sam; Sam and Cat are forced to ask Nevel for help.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: While helping Goomer with a bully at his gym, Sam knocks out an MMA champion.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat try to avoid getting in trouble when they accidentally knock out musician Del DeVille.

programme.title: Victorious: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Victorious: Stage Fighting
programme.desc: Tori has to defend herself after Jade claims Tori hurt her in a stage fighting exercise. Meanwhile, Trina has to fend off Robbie's advances when he thinks their stage kiss meant something.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: Victorious: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Victorious: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Victorious: A Film by Dale Squires
programme.desc: When a hot young filmmaker comes to Hollywood Arts, the kids are excited to work on his project. But when the film is released, and they aren't given credit, the kids turn to revenge.

programme.title: Victorious: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck, and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Victorious: The Diddly-Bops
programme.desc: Sikowitz recruits the gang to form a children's band for a friend's party. When a leaked video of the group's performance becomes popular, Andre struggles to be taken seriously as a musician.

programme.title: Victorious: Cat's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Cat begins dating Tori's ex-boyfriend, Danny (Matt Angel) and Tori becomes jealous. Meanwhile, Trina convinces Robbie, Andre, Jade and Beck to indulge their feet in callus-eating fish that she's been buying from some stranger.

programme.title: Victorious: Sleepover at Sikowitz's
programme.desc: Sikowitz invites the gang to have a sleepover at his house in order to teach them a lesson in method acting.

programme.title: Victorious: The Wood
programme.desc: The kids are excited to hear that they'll be the stars of a new reality show being filmed at Hollywood Arts. Meanwhile, Trina and Robbie are forced to work at The Grub Truck after injuring Festus.

programme.title: Victorious: The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: Victorious: Wok Star
programme.desc: Tori agrees to help Jade find a theater to perform a play Jade wrote. But when the sponsor demands changes that will ruin Jade's play, Tori has to make things right before opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Survival of the Hottest
programme.desc: A heat wave hits LA and the gang heads for the beach in Beck's RV. But once there, they find themselves trapped inside the RV as the temperature rises. Oblivious, Cat parties it up with some cute boys.

programme.title: Victorious: Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed, leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat, but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck Falls for Tori
programme.desc: Tori auditions for a role in a movie. But after exaggerating on her resume, she gets hired as a stunt double. When Tori finds out her stunt is falling off a building, she's not sure she can do it.

programme.title: Victorious: Helen Back Again
programme.desc: When Principal Eikner leaves Hollywood Arts, the school hires a new principal who makes all the students re-audition in order to keep their spots. Who will get kicked out?

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Gets Stuck
programme.desc: Tori Gets Stuck: Tori is excited when she gets cast as the lead in the school play, but she has to deal with her very unhappy understudy… Jade. Tori has to avoid Jade's constant sabotage so she can perform on opening night.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: An eccentric billionaire asks the iCarly gang to perform the first live web show from outer space. They go through a series of tests to make sure they're fit for space travel. Back at the loft, Spencer is visited by a mysterious little girl.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Bigfoot fever hits Seattle when hikers take some fuzzy footage of a suspicious figure in the woods. After an expert validates the footage on the web show, Carly convinces the gang to go upstate and join the search for Bigfoot.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Fed up with his Mom constantly treating him like a baby, Freddie decides to move out into his own place. The gang starts a successful pet photography business. They end up in a feud with a rival pet photo studio.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When a heatwave hits Seattle and the power goes out, Spencer comes to the rescue with a Norwegian air conditioner.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The Cast introduces bloopers and outtakes from the series.
